title: Basic Punctuation: . ,
description: Period (right ring finger) and comma (right middle finger). Foundational for any real sentence.

drills.content: k,k l.l k,k l.l k,k l.l k,k l.l
yes, no, maybe, sometimes, often, never, always.
I went, I saw, I learned, I returned home.
First, second, third. Then, finally, the end.
